commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Prophesying, "acting like fools "(Chaldean) performing their superstitious rites, and singing the praises of their god (Calmet)
Sacrifice, by Elias, who had assigned all the morning to Baal's prophets. Perhaps he waited till the time of the evening sacrifice, Exodus xxix. 38. (Menochius)
